mechanic_overview.leveling_logic: Aptitudes and Sub-traits level through relevant usage. Values range from 0-100. Higher values represent mastery and unlock 'Breaking Points' for advanced abilities/items.
mechanic_overview.progression_speed: Sub-traits level faster (approx. 25% per 100 turns) than Main Aptitudes (approx. 10% per 100 turns).
mechanic_overview.experience_cap: Martial experience gain tapers off as the hero survives more battles (diminishing returns on mastery).
mechanic_overview.aging_impact: Natural peak at age 35. Physiological decline begins at age 50. Cognition/Scholarly traits continue to grow regardless of age.

aptitudes.function: Controls initiative, skill ceiling, and resistance to mental/spiritual stressors (stamina drain, damage shocks, curses).

sub_traits.name: Tenacity
sub_traits.description: Ability to max out dice rolls and resist immediate physical/mental fatigue.

sub_traits.name: Resonance
sub_traits.description: Measures Loyalty (to a team/cause) and Religiosity. Affects efficacy of faith-based actions and group synergy. Increases with successful team outcomes.

sub_traits.name: Openness
sub_traits.description: A fixed-value filter (0-10). Dictates receptivity to foreign cultures/faiths. High values speed up learning foreign Materium but increase vulnerability to foreign Maleficium.
sub_traits.social_interaction: Acts as the multiplier for Presence. Determines if Presence is perceived as Intimidating (Low) or Magnetic (High).

aptitudes.function: The biological vessel. Dictates physical limits and survival capability.

sub_traits.name: Vitality (HP)
sub_traits.description: Permanent health pool. Derived primarily from race, but reinforced by Hardening.

sub_traits.name: Hardening (Resistances)
sub_traits.description: Trained in combat. Resistance to damage types. Starts at 1-10%, maxes at 50%.

sub_traits.name: Vigor (Strength)
sub_traits.description: Allows use/carry of heavy items. Affects physical damage. Increases by using heavy equipment. Tapers at 50, then declines with age.

sub_traits.name: Metabolism (Stamina)
sub_traits.description: How fast and long a hero can move. Linked to Conviction for 'Pushing' limits.

aptitudes.function: The sum of learned knowledge and practical world-application.

sub_traits.name: Erudition (Scholarly)
sub_traits.description: Ability to learn new spells and Materium theories. Higher values make learning easier. Grows more naturally in older heroes.

sub_traits.name: Ingenuity (Crafts)
sub_traits.description: Skill in creating or repairing items from materials and ingredients.

sub_traits.name: Worldliness (Common)
sub_traits.description: Practical skills such as lockpicking, pickpocketing, and social navigation.

sub_traits.name: Scarring (Trauma)
sub_traits.description: Negative life experiences. Increases through age or severe failure. Can provide defensive grit but may negatively affect max Conviction.

aptitudes.function: Etheral mystical affinity required for magical skills. Inherited/Birth-given capacity.

sub_traits.name: Conduit Grade
sub_traits.description: The innate capacity to flow magic. Affected negatively by high Vigor (Physical strength). Hard to improve through training.

sub_traits.name: Shadow Connection
sub_traits.description: Unique link to the Dark Arts and the Shadow Realm. Distinct from standard Materium schools.

sub_traits.name: Insulation (Magic Resistance)
sub_traits.description: Resistance to Materium effects. Starts at 1-10%, maxes at 50%. Levels slowly through exposure.

aptitudes.function: Muscle memory and technical combat skill. General boost to physical damage types.

sub_traits.name: Affinities (Weapon Skills)
sub_traits.description: Mastery of specific weapon types (Swordsman, Archer, etc.). Levels by successful combat rolls.

sub_traits.name: Agilities (Reflex)
sub_traits.description: Ability to dodge or land critical strikes. Levels incrementally by successful dodge/crit rolls.

aptitudes.function: How the world perceives the hero. Derived from Beauty, social skills, and status.
aptitudes.interaction_logic: Presence is filtered by the Openness value of both the hero and the observer.

sub_traits.name: Gravitas
sub_traits.description: Authority and social weight. High Presence + Low Openness = Intimidation/Fear. High Presence + High Openness = Inspiration/Magnetism.

sub_traits.name: Eloquence
sub_traits.description: The practical application of talkativity, diplomacy, and persuasion.
